sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: maximize geometric mean HPR across probability distribution (-8SD to +8SD) for given time horizon T until mandated exit. Position size derived from f value that maximizes G(f,T) formula. Optimal f recalculated per time period/expiration cycle.

source_rule_text: Calculate the geometric mean HPR across a range of f values from -8 standard deviations to +8 standard deviations to determine optimal position sizing for a given time period until expiration.
